items.content_html: Community plugins list, theme list, and releases of Obsidian.
items.title: obsidianmd/obsidian-releases: Community plugins list, theme list, and releases of Obsidian.

items.content_html: New Plugin Project
items.title: Xlinka/Project-Obsidian: New Plugin Project

items.content_html: Auto Filename is an Obsidian.md plugin that automatically renames files in Obsidian based on the first x characters of the file, saving you time and effort.
items.title: rcsaquino/obsidian-auto-filename: Auto Filename is an Obsidian.md plugin that automatically renames files in Obsidian based on the first x characters of the file, saving you time and effort.

items.content_html: Plugin for Obsidian. Search and insert quotes from a source text as you type. This is great for reading a physical book or eReader while taking notes on a separate laptop or phone.
items.title: alangrainger/obsidian-air-quotes: Plugin for Obsidian. Search and insert quotes from a source text as you type. This is great for reading a physical book or eReader while taking notes on a separate laptop or phone.

items.content_html: A plugin that tries to solve all the trivial problems most people usually encountered in obsidian. 旨在解决大多数人在Obsidian中遇到的所有琐碎问题
items.title: JuckZ/awesome-brain-manager: A plugin that tries to solve all the trivial problems most people usually encountered in obsidian. 旨在解决大多数人在Obsidian中遇到的所有琐碎问题

items.content_html: Grabs data from IVRE and brings it into Obsidian notes
items.title: ivre/obsidian-ivre-plugin: Grabs data from IVRE and brings it into Obsidian notes

items.title: Zevvi/Obsidian-formatting: An Obsidian plugin for adding extra customizations to formatted text

items.title: fez-github/obsidian-multi-tag: Obsidian plugin that allows the user to add a tag to all files in a folder.  Still in development.

items.content_html: Obsidian plugin: Highlight, dim & style your files & folders in the file explorer (navigation) based on predefined or custom rules.
items.title: iOSonntag/obsidian-plugin-treefocus: Obsidian plugin: Highlight, dim & style your files & folders in the file explorer (navigation) based on predefined or custom rules.

items.content_html: Streamline your note-taking workflow with ease. This Obsidian plugin combines customizable note templates, event management, and implementation following DDD (Domain Driven Design) principles.
items.title: jesuserro/obsigen: Streamline your note-taking workflow with ease. This Obsidian plugin combines customizable note templates, event management, and implementation following DDD (Domain Driven Design) principles.

items.content_html: A plugin for Obsidian that can create input fields inside your notes and bind them to metadata fields.
items.title: mProjectsCode/obsidian-meta-bind-plugin: A plugin for Obsidian that can create input fields inside your notes and bind them to metadata fields.
